name: Trend + Pullback
description: Enter in the direction of the major trend after a pullback to a dynamic support/resistance level.

entry_conditions.trend: Price above 200 EMA for BUY; below 200 EMA for SELL
entry_conditions.pullback: Price retraces to 50 EMA zone (within 0.3% of 50 EMA)
entry_conditions.momentum: RSI between 40-60 after pullback (neutral zone reentry)
entry_conditions.macd: MACD histogram turning positive for BUY, negative for SELL
entry_conditions.confirmation: Close candle beyond the pullback high/low

exit_conditions.take_profit: Previous swing high (BUY) or swing low (SELL)
exit_conditions.stop_loss: Below pullback candle low (BUY) or above pullback candle high (SELL)
exit_conditions.trailing: Move SL to breakeven after 1:1 RR is reached

name: Breakout Strategy
description: Trade the break of a key consolidation zone or structure high/low with volume confirmation.

entry_conditions.consolidation: Price range < 0.5% ATR for at least 10 candles
entry_conditions.breakout: Close above resistance (BUY) or below support (SELL) by at least 0.1%
entry_conditions.volume: Volume > 1.5x 20-period average volume on breakout candle
entry_conditions.rsi: RSI > 55 for BUY breakout; RSI < 45 for SELL breakout

exit_conditions.take_profit: Consolidation range height projected from breakout level × 2
exit_conditions.retest_entry: If price retests breakout level and holds, adds to position

name: RSI Divergence
description: Trade when price makes a new high/low but RSI fails to confirm, signaling trend exhaustion.

entry_conditions.price_action: Price makes higher high (bearish div) or lower low (bullish div)
entry_conditions.rsi_divergence: RSI makes lower high during price HH (bearish) or higher low during price LL (bullish)
entry_conditions.rsi_levels: RSI > 65 for bearish divergence; RSI < 35 for bullish divergence
entry_conditions.confirmation: Reversal candle (engulfing, doji, hammer) at divergence point
entry_conditions.macd: MACD crossing signal line in direction of trade

exit_conditions.time_exit: Exit if price does not move after 8 candles

name: Support/Resistance Bounce
description: Trade the reaction from a historically significant support or resistance zone.

entry_conditions.zone_identification: Key level tested at least 2 times previously
entry_conditions.approach: Price approaching zone with momentum (MACD expanding)
entry_conditions.reaction: Rejection candle (wick ≥ 2× body) at the zone
entry_conditions.rsi: RSI < 35 at support (BUY) or RSI > 65 at resistance (SELL)
entry_conditions.ema_confluence: Zone near 50 EMA or 200 EMA adds extra weight

exit_conditions.take_profit: Next major S/R zone in direction of trade
exit_conditions.stop_loss: Zone invalidation point (below support or above resistance by 0.2%)
exit_conditions.partial_exit: Take 50% at 1:1 RR, let rest run

name: Liquidity Sweep
description: Trade the reversal after a false break that sweeps stop-loss clusters above highs or below lows.

entry_conditions.sweep: Price spikes beyond a significant swing high/low by 0.05-0.3%, then closes back inside
entry_conditions.internal_liquidity: RSI shows reversal: spike spike high RSI > 70 for SELL sweep, < 30 for BUY sweep
entry_conditions.bos: Break of Structure in the opposite direction after sweep
entry_conditions.volume: High volume spike on the sweep candle
entry_conditions.confirmation: Strong reversal candle closing beyond BOS level

exit_conditions.take_profit: Opposing liquidity pool (next swing high/low on opposite side)
exit_conditions.quick_exit: Exit if price re-sweeps the same level
